fa-arrow-down-z-a.appearanceId: downward arrow with letters Z above A
fa-arrow-down-z-a.functionalityId: sorts list in reverse alphabetical order
fa-arrow-down-z-a.intentId: organize items from Z to A

fa-arrow-from-bottom.appearanceId: arrow pointing upward away from a horizontal base line
fa-arrow-from-bottom.functionalityId: moves or exports content upward from bottom
fa-arrow-from-bottom.intentId: push or send content up from a boundary

fa-arrow-from-left.appearanceId: arrow pointing rightward away from a vertical left line
fa-arrow-from-left.functionalityId: moves or expands content away from left edge
fa-arrow-from-left.intentId: shift or reveal content toward the right

fa-arrow-from-right.appearanceId: arrow pointing leftward away from a vertical right line
fa-arrow-from-right.functionalityId: moves or expands content away from right edge
fa-arrow-from-right.intentId: shift or reveal content toward the left

fa-arrow-from-top.appearanceId: arrow pointing downward away from a horizontal top line
fa-arrow-from-top.functionalityId: moves or exports content downward from top
fa-arrow-from-top.intentId: push or send content down from a boundary

fa-arrow-left.appearanceId: single arrow pointing left with horizontal shaft
fa-arrow-left.functionalityId: navigates to the previous item or page
fa-arrow-left.intentId: go back to the prior view

fa-arrow-left-from-arc.appearanceId: arrow pointing left exiting from the left side of a curved arc
fa-arrow-left-from-arc.functionalityId: exits or departs from a curved boundary leftward
fa-arrow-left-from-arc.intentId: leave or escape a looped or rounded context

fa-arrow-left-from-bracket.appearanceId: arrow pointing left exiting from a right-facing bracket
fa-arrow-left-from-bracket.functionalityId: logs out or exits from a bounded context
fa-arrow-left-from-bracket.intentId: sign out or leave a contained area

fa-arrow-left-long.appearanceId: long arrow pointing left with extended horizontal shaft
fa-arrow-left-long.functionalityId: navigates far back or returns to origin
fa-arrow-left-long.intentId: go back to a distant or starting point

fa-arrow-left-long-to-line.appearanceId: long leftward arrow with its tip touching a vertical line on the left
fa-arrow-left-long-to-line.functionalityId: navigates to the leftmost boundary or start
fa-arrow-left-long-to-line.intentId: jump to the beginning or left edge

fa-arrow-left-to-arc.appearanceId: arrow pointing left entering into the left side of a curved arc
fa-arrow-left-to-arc.functionalityId: enters or imports into a curved or looped context
fa-arrow-left-to-arc.intentId: go into or join a rounded or looped flow

fa-arrow-left-to-bracket.appearanceId: arrow pointing left entering into a left-facing bracket
fa-arrow-left-to-bracket.functionalityId: logs in or enters a bounded context from the right
fa-arrow-left-to-bracket.intentId: sign in or enter a contained area

fa-arrow-pointer.appearanceId: diagonal mouse cursor arrow pointing up-left
fa-arrow-pointer.functionalityId: activates pointer or selection cursor mode
fa-arrow-pointer.intentId: switch to the default cursor for selecting

fa-arrow-progress.appearanceId: arrow following a segmented step-like path moving rightward
fa-arrow-progress.functionalityId: shows or advances through a multi-step workflow
fa-arrow-progress.intentId: view or move forward in a staged process

fa-arrow-right.appearanceId: single arrow pointing right with horizontal shaft
fa-arrow-right.functionalityId: navigates to the next item or page
fa-arrow-right.intentId: go forward to the next view

fa-arrow-right-from-arc.appearanceId: arrow pointing right exiting from the right side of a curved arc
fa-arrow-right-from-arc.functionalityId: exits or departs from a curved boundary rightward
fa-arrow-right-from-arc.intentId: leave or escape a looped or rounded context

fa-arrow-right-long.appearanceId: long arrow pointing right with extended horizontal shaft
fa-arrow-right-long.functionalityId: advances far forward or continues to destination
fa-arrow-right-long.intentId: proceed to a distant or final point

fa-arrow-right-long-to-line.appearanceId: long rightward arrow with its tip touching a vertical line on the right
fa-arrow-right-long-to-line.functionalityId: navigates to the rightmost boundary or end
fa-arrow-right-long-to-line.intentId: jump to the end or right edge

fa-arrow-right-to-arc.appearanceId: arrow pointing right entering into the right side of a curved arc
fa-arrow-right-to-arc.functionalityId: enters or imports into a curved or looped context
fa-arrow-right-to-arc.intentId: go into or join a rounded or looped flow

fa-arrow-right-to-city.appearanceId: rightward arrow pointing toward a small city skyline silhouette
fa-arrow-right-to-city.functionalityId: navigates to or directs toward a city or location
fa-arrow-right-to-city.intentId: travel to or select an urban destination

fa-arrow-square-down.appearanceId: downward arrow inside a square border
fa-arrow-square-down.intentId: save or expand content downward within a container

fa-arrow-square-left.appearanceId: leftward arrow inside a square border
fa-arrow-square-left.functionalityId: navigates back or moves content left in a container
fa-arrow-square-left.intentId: go back or shift content leftward

fa-arrow-square-right.appearanceId: rightward arrow inside a square border
fa-arrow-square-right.functionalityId: navigates forward or moves content right in a container

fa-arrow-square-up.appearanceId: upward arrow inside a square border
fa-arrow-square-up.intentId: send or push content upward within a container

fa-arrow-to-bottom.appearanceId: arrow pointing downward toward a horizontal base line
fa-arrow-to-bottom.functionalityId: scrolls to bottom or downloads to local storage
fa-arrow-to-bottom.intentId: reach the lowest point or save to device

fa-arrow-to-left.appearanceId: arrow pointing leftward toward a vertical left line
fa-arrow-to-left.functionalityId: collapses panel or moves content to left boundary
fa-arrow-to-left.intentId: dock or snap content to the left edge

fa-arrow-to-right.appearanceId: arrow pointing rightward toward a vertical right line
fa-arrow-to-right.functionalityId: collapses panel or moves content to right boundary
fa-arrow-to-right.intentId: dock or snap content to the right edge

fa-arrow-to-top.appearanceId: arrow pointing upward toward a horizontal top line
fa-arrow-to-top.functionalityId: scrolls to top or uploads to a remote destination
fa-arrow-to-top.intentId: reach the highest point or send to a remote

fa-arrow-trend-down.appearanceId: downward-trending diagonal arrow with a shallow declining slope
fa-arrow-trend-down.functionalityId: displays a declining trend or metric
fa-arrow-trend-down.intentId: see that a value or performance is decreasing

fa-arrow-trend-up.appearanceId: upward-trending diagonal arrow with a shallow rising slope
fa-arrow-trend-up.functionalityId: displays a rising trend or metric
fa-arrow-trend-up.intentId: see that a value or performance is increasing

fa-arrow-turn-down-left.appearanceId: arrow going down then curving left
fa-arrow-turn-down-left.functionalityId: redirects flow downward then to the left
fa-arrow-turn-down-left.intentId: follow a turn in a path or workflow

fa-arrow-turn-down-right.appearanceId: arrow going down then curving right
fa-arrow-turn-down-right.functionalityId: redirects flow downward then to the right
fa-arrow-turn-down-right.intentId: follow a turn in a path or workflow

fa-arrow-turn-left.appearanceId: arrow curving upward then turning left
fa-arrow-turn-left.functionalityId: redirects or returns flow to the left
fa-arrow-turn-left.intentId: go back or reverse direction to the left

fa-arrow-turn-left-down.appearanceId: arrow turning left then pointing downward
fa-arrow-turn-left-down.intentId: follow a downward-left turn in a path

fa-arrow-turn-left-up.appearanceId: arrow turning left then pointing upward
fa-arrow-turn-left-up.intentId: follow an upward-left turn in a path

fa-arrow-turn-right.appearanceId: arrow curving upward then turning right
fa-arrow-turn-right.functionalityId: redirects or continues flow to the right
fa-arrow-turn-right.intentId: proceed forward or redirect direction to the right

fa-arrow-up.appearanceId: single arrow pointing upward with vertical shaft
fa-arrow-up.functionalityId: scrolls up or increases a value

fa-arrow-up-1-9.appearanceId: upward arrow with numeral 1 above numeral 9
fa-arrow-up-1-9.functionalityId: sorts list in ascending numerical order
fa-arrow-up-1-9.intentId: organize items from lowest to highest number

fa-arrow-up-9-1.appearanceId: upward arrow with numeral 9 above numeral 1
fa-arrow-up-9-1.functionalityId: sorts list in descending numerical order
fa-arrow-up-9-1.intentId: organize items from highest to lowest number

fa-arrow-up-a-z.appearanceId: upward arrow with letter A above letter Z
fa-arrow-up-a-z.functionalityId: sorts list in ascending alphabetical order
fa-arrow-up-a-z.intentId: organize items from A to Z

fa-arrow-up-from-arc.appearanceId: arrow pointing upward rising out from the top of a curved arc
fa-arrow-up-from-arc.functionalityId: exports or lifts content out of a curved boundary
fa-arrow-up-from-arc.intentId: extract or elevate content from a looped context

fa-arrow-up-from-bracket.appearanceId: arrow pointing upward exiting from an upward-facing bracket
fa-arrow-up-from-bracket.functionalityId: uploads or shares content from a container
fa-arrow-up-from-bracket.intentId: send or export content out of a box

fa-arrow-up-from-dotted-line.appearanceId: arrow pointing upward rising from a horizontal dotted line below
fa-arrow-up-from-dotted-line.functionalityId: promotes or moves content above a threshold line
fa-arrow-up-from-dotted-line.intentId: lift content above a marked or implied boundary

fa-arrow-up-from-ground-water.appearanceId: upward arrow above ground-level waves indicating water below surface
fa-arrow-up-from-ground-water.functionalityId: indicates groundwater extraction or water level rise
fa-arrow-up-from-ground-water.intentId: monitor or trigger groundwater pumping or flooding alert

fa-arrow-up-from-square.appearanceId: arrow pointing upward exiting from the top of a square
fa-arrow-up-from-square.functionalityId: exports or shares content from a boxed container
fa-arrow-up-from-square.intentId: send or upload content out of a defined area

fa-arrow-up-from-water-pump.appearanceId: upward arrow rising above a water pump silhouette
fa-arrow-up-from-water-pump.functionalityId: indicates water pump output or flow direction
fa-arrow-up-from-water-pump.intentId: monitor or activate a water pumping system

fa-arrow-up-left.appearanceId: diagonal arrow pointing toward the upper-left
fa-arrow-up-left.functionalityId: moves or navigates content up and to the left
fa-arrow-up-left.intentId: shift focus or item diagonally toward upper-left

fa-arrow-up-left-from-circle.appearanceId: diagonal arrow pointing upper-left exiting from a circle
fa-arrow-up-left-from-circle.functionalityId: exits or expands content out of a circular boundary
fa-arrow-up-left-from-circle.intentId: break out of or leave a circular or looped context
